title: VFD fault F05 — Pump-001
description: Overcurrent on startup. Power cycled to clear. No load anomaly found.

title: Belt tracking adjustment — Conv-001
description: Belt off 2mm at tail pulley. Adjusted take-up bolt.

title: Compressor high temp alarm
description: Discharge temp 218°F. Cleaned condenser fins. Ambient 94°F.

title: PLC I/O module fault — Slot 4
description: 1769-IQ16 faulted. Reseated module. Intermittent.

title: Hydraulic oil low — Press-001
description: Oil 2 inches below sight glass. Added 3 gal AW-46. No visible leaks.

title: Robot J3 lubrication — quarterly PM
description: 80cc Kluber NBU15 via Zerk at J3. No abnormal noise.

title: Fire extinguisher inspection
description: All 12 inspected. Unit #7 recharged — gauge was in yellow zone.

title: VFD fault F05 — Pump-001
description: Overcurrent on startup again. Increased accel ramp P042 from 2.0s to 3.5s.

title: Weld tip dresser skip — Robot-001
description: Cutter skipping every 3rd cycle. Blades worn. Replaced assembly.

title: Belt tracking — Conv-001
description: Off 4mm again. Take-up spring showing wear. Ordered replacement.

title: Compressor oil analysis
description: TAN 1.8 (replace at 2.0). Iron 35 ppm. Oil change scheduled.

title: PLC program backup — quarterly
description: Downloaded L33ER program. Stored on network drive. No changes.

title: VFD fault F05 — Pump-001
description: Third occurrence. DC bus voltage 5% below nominal. Suspect capacitor aging.

title: Hydraulic slow cycle — Press-001
description: Cycle 12s vs normal 8s. Pressure 2800 vs 3000 spec. Adjusted relief valve.

title: Compressed air leak audit
description: Ultrasonic survey found 8 leaks. 15 CFM loss estimated. Repaired 6 of 8.

title: Belt slipping — Conv-001
description: 8% speed loss under load. Tensioned to spec 45 lbs.

title: Compressor oil and filter changed
description: Reset service interval. Running at 195°F discharge.

title: E-731 encoder fault — Robot-001 Axis 2
description: Following error on J2 fast traverse. Cable wear at CN2 bend point. Rerouted with strain relief.

title: VFD fault F05 — Pump-001
description: 5th time in 60 days. Motor 112% FLA. Coupling misalignment corrected.

title: Hydraulic filter replacement — Press-001
description: 10-micron return filter collapsed. Metal contamination visible. Oil sample sent to lab.

title: Case erector sensor alignment — PLC Line 1
description: Prox sensor gap 8mm adjusted to 4mm per spec.

title: Safety shower test — monthly
description: All 4 stations tested per ANSI Z358.1. Station 3 strainer cleaned.

title: Belt edge fraying — Conv-001
description: Splice fraying. Field splice was 6 months old. Full belt replacement scheduled.

title: VFD fault F05 — Pump-001
description: DC bus capacitor ESR 2.3x nominal. Replacement on order P/N GS1-CAP-460.

title: Robot mastering check — post-collision
description: Minor collision detected. Re-mastered 6 axes. TCP within 0.5mm.

title: Compressor high temp again
description: Discharge 221°F at 97°F ambient. Thermal valve sluggish. Replaced.

title: Oil analysis results — Press-001
description: ISO 18/16/13 (target 17/15/12). Silicon 22 ppm — external contamination. Breather replaced.

title: New belt installed — Conv-001
description: Old belt had 3mm wear at splice. Take-up spring also replaced.

title: PLC battery low — L33ER
description: 1769-BA at 2.8V. Replaced proactively. New battery 3.6V.

title: VFD capacitor replaced — Pump-001
description: DC bus capacitor installed. F05 fault cleared. Monitoring.

title: Emergency generator load test
description: 150kW genset at 75% load 30 min. Voltage and frequency stable.

title: Compressor PM — quarterly
description: Air filter replaced. Belt tension OK. Oil topped off.

title: Robot backup controller program
description: Full image backup R-30iB Plus to USB. MD5 verified.

title: Conv-001 post-replacement check
description: Tracking centered. Tension 44 lbs. No slip under full load.

title: Hydraulic press quarterly PM
description: Hose conditions OK. Cylinder rod OK. Pressure gauge within 2%.

title: Palletizer E-stop investigation
description: Operator hit E-stop for perceived jam. No jam found. Retrained operator.

title: Lockout/tagout procedure review
description: Annual LOTO review. Updated Pump-001 procedure to include DC bus discharge.

title: VFD no recurrence — Pump-001
description: 9 days since capacitor replacement. No F05. Closing pattern.

title: Weld schedule optimization — Robot-001
description: Current adjusted 12.5kA to 13.0kA. Nugget 4.8mm to 5.2mm.

title: Robot J1 reducer noise
description: Grinding noise CW >50%. Vibration 4.2 mm/s vs 2.8 baseline. Monitoring.

title: 5S audit — maintenance shop
description: Score 38/50. Chemical labels faded. Shadow board missing 2 tools.
